name: agent-harness-suite
description: Unified bundle: 19 process skills (brainstorming, planning, TDD, verification, review, finishing) + 2 redteam skills (adversarial review + result handling) + redteam implementation (commands, prompts, scripts, schemas).
compatibility: Designed for Claude Code, Codex CLI, GitHub Copilot CLI (skills layer only), and Kimi (via kimi.plugin.json sidecar)

interface.longDescription: Unified bundle of process skills (brainstorming, writing-plans, subagent-driven-development, TDD, verification-before-completion, systematic-debugging, finishing-a-development-branch, quality-contracts, purpose-first-tdd, existing-capability-first, dispatching-parallel-agents, executing-plans, human-writing, instruction-writing, receiving/requesting-code-review, using-git-worktrees, writing-skills, using-skills, plus redteam adversarial review + result handling). Designed for cross-CLI portability per the Agent Skills open standard. Redteam is read-only and uses cross-model adversarial panels via /redteam:* commands.
